title: acetosella dregei
intro: Acetosella dregei, also known as the Sour Berry or South African cranberry, is a small, shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Oxalidaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional South African medicine, where it is valued for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acetosella dregei include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Acetosella dregei is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, and its berries can also be eaten fresh or used in jams and preserves, although its use should be limited due to its high oxalate content.
